summary: Home health intake, scribe, and QA workflows with AI.
editor_note: Home health software often treats the nurse as the data-entry layer; this pushes the paperwork into the visit itself. Enzo shows Intake, Scribe, and QA modules with OASIS validation, referral checks, secure messaging, and 5-minute intake-to-admission claims. Unlike generic medical scribes, the bet is one thread from bedside note to reimbursement. The risk is integrating deeply enough with fragmented agency systems.
why_featured: $20M Series A for home health AI
investors: N47, Gradient, Tandem Ventures, Rigby Watts
